judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (a line chart on a log scale) but Description B provides detailed axis labels, legend content, and a caption that Description A omits without contradiction.
original_image_tags: A line graph with a logarithmic y-axis and a linear x-axis.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A plotted line graph titled “LLV1 Random-Attitude Failures through 290 sec” with multiple curves and a legend for breakup q-alpha values (no breakup, 20,000, 10,000, 5,000 deg-lb/ft²) and B = 1,000 with A values 1.85, 2.60, 2.70, and 2.75; axes read “Percent in 5-deg sector (%)” and “Angle From Flight Path (deg),” with caption “Figure 30. LLV1 Simulation Results with B = 1,000.”*
